description: Certified frontier witness: mixed-minor network in N+ whose segment-averaged Jacobian determinant is negative at an explicit pair
claimed_note: All claimed values are machine-computed from the A, B, c and witness_pair fields of this file exactly as shipped. The witness_pair coordinates (8 decimals) are canonical: the pair IS the witness, not an approximation to one. v1.1 2026-06-11: seg_avg_det and min_detDF_on_segment previously carried values computed from the pre-rounding optimizer pair; corrected to shipped-pair values after the author's blind check exposed the mismatch. v1.2 2026-06-11: claimed.minors added carrying all six minor products (paper-facing constants), so the certificate checker audits every printed minor, not only the negative one.
